      cases' hσ with e
      use e
    cases' h_loc with e
    have h_pseudo : (LinearMap.id : M →ₗ[A] M).IsPseudoIsomorphism := by
      apply LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map.mpr
      exact h_iso
    have h_pseudo' : (LinearMap.id : N →ₗ[A] N).IsPseudoIsomorphism := by
      apply LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map.mpr
      exact hMN
    refine ⟨e.toLinearMap.preimage, ?_⟩
    simp [isPseudoIsomorphism_iff]

constructor
  · intro h
    intro p hp
    obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
    use LocalizedModule.map _ f
    refine LinearEquiv.ofBijective ?_ (hf.1 _ hp) (hf.2 _ hp)
  · intro h
    apply Module.IsPseudoIsomorphism.mk
    intro p hp
    obtain ⟨e⟩ := h p hp
    exact e.toLinearMap.injective
    intro p hp
    obtain ⟨e⟩ := h p hp
    exact e.toLinearMap.surjective
